name: The Last Drive-in with Joe Bob Briggs
original_name: The Last Drive-in with Joe Bob Briggs
overview: The World’s Foremost Drive-in Movie Critic – actually he’s pretty much the world’s only Drive-in Critic – Joe Bob Briggs brings his iconic swagger to this firebrand of horror and drive-in cinema offering honest appreciation, hilarious insight, inside stories and of course, the Drive-in totals.

trailers.title: The Last Drive-In Is BACK! | New Season Starts April 21st on Shudder and AMC+
